decisions.decision: Sonnet + web_search everywhere for user-facing AI routes
decisions.rationale: User guardrail: Haiku's world-knowledge gaps produced wrong estimates on niche beverages (Mio Mio Mate 1.9 vs 20 mg/100ml). Every user-facing AI route must use Sonnet at minimum and have web_search available.

decisions.decision: Parse route field rename salt → value_mg + explicit measurement_type
decisions.rationale: Previous schema conflated sodium (Na) and salt (NaCl) units. Rename makes API contract unambiguous; client does the conversion.

decisions.decision: Set sodiumSource BEFORE sodiumMg in food-section.tsx
decisions.rationale: React state updates are queued; dropdown must reflect correct unit before user sees the number next to it.
callbackURL on signUp.email is server-flow metadata, not a client redirect. Explicit navigation required.

decisions.decision: window.location is banned for in-app navigation
decisions.rationale: Converted all sign-out callers to router.replace/refresh. Legitimate uses (reload() for SW/version updates, .origin/.protocol reads) still allowed.

decisions.decision: max_tokens bump strategy for web_search routes
decisions.rationale: web_search server tool adds tool_use/tool_result blocks that count toward output. Bumped each route with headroom: substance-lookup/enrich 512→1024, medicine-search 2048→3072, titration-warnings 1536→2560, interaction-check 2048→3072.

next_action: User re-tests Scenario 8 (Mio Mio Mate caffeine lookup + salt-labelled food parse + medicine-search with country). Then proceed to Scenario 9 (pnpm test:e2e) and Scenario 10 (build + lint).
context_notes: All 6 AI routes (parse + substance-lookup + substance-enrich + medicine-search + titration-warnings + interaction-check) now use the same pattern: Sonnet quality model, WEB_SEARCH_TOOL prepended to tools array, forced tool_choice to app tool (web_search runs transparently as server tool), tool_use content blocks filtered by name with type predicate (defensive against server-tool blocks), system prompts have web_search guidance. Typecheck clean, vitest 451/451 passing. Only human UAT (Scenarios 8 retest, 9, 10) remains before Phase 41 can close. Phase 41 is the last non-human plan in the phase.
